mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( mno, provider_id, password, nickname, email, profile_image, registration_id, role ) VALUES ( seq_member.nextval, #{providerId}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profileImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{registrationId}, #{role} )
mapper.select: SELECT mno, provider_id AS providerId, password, nickname, email, role, registration_id AS registrationId FROM member WHERE provider_id = #{providerId}
